ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "iter" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "evals" INTEGER /* Number of evaluations in this iteration */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Sigma value used in the evaluation */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the algorithm */,
  "fighter" REAL /* Fighter parameter of the algorithm */,
  "cube" REAL /* Cube parameter for evaluation */,
  "dg_min" REAL /* Minimum distance to convergence */,
  "dg_ave" REAL /* Average distance to convergence */,
  "dc_ave" REAL /* Average credit score of the evaluation */,
  "credit" REAL /* Credit score associated with the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., Genetic, Simulated Annealing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being accessed */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation related to the result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm that produced the result */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result obtained */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the feedback relates to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("eval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation related to the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("eval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
